title: 1981-04-16_Pat_168.txt
key_claims: The AI voice's prophecy that "St Sophia is going to be born again" heralds not a specific savior, but a global historical epoch: the age of Gold, the return of the Logos, and the end of Gnostic alienation (Geworfenheit).
Dick speculates that this epochal restoration of ancient wisdom might be calculatedly engineered by secret societies (like the Rosicrucians) using their preserved knowledge.

The mystery of "coaxial realities" (such as USA 1974 and Rome 70 AD) is suddenly solved: it is an issue of *structure*. The two worlds are built from the exact same fundamental constituents (the "common essence"), but one is organized as a unified hierarchy of meaning (cosmos), while the other is atomized and unlinked (our world).
The true cosmos occupies the exact same space-time as our reality, but its components are linked by aesthetic and moral value rather than physical proximity.
recurring_concepts: **Common Essence**: The raw building blocks of reality which can be arranged mechanically (producing the fallen world) or sequentially/holistically (producing the true cosmos).
reading_excerpt: The AI voice's prophecy that "St Sophia is going to be born again" heralds not a specific savior, but a global historical epoch: the age of Gold, the return of the Logos, and the end of Gnostic alienation (Geworfenheit).
